data.content: Implementation complete. Refactored beat-table-metadata.tsx to read one canonical key per concept on handoff capsules: agentname/model/version/username. Dropped 130 lines of nested-object scaffolding and multi-key fallback chains. Grep gate passes (single "agentname" constant on line 121). Commit f7eec7a1 on worktree branch. lint, tsc, test (310 files, 3095 pass), build all green pre-commit.
